pre_game.message: Hey, I'm B – it's nice to meet you. I've got a three-year-old daughter back home who's my whole world, and I'm here hoping to win enough to help her out; what's bringing you to this game?

Hey B, nice to meet you too—sounds like you've got a lot of heart for your little one, I hope this game treats you well. I'm C, and I'm here to win some cash for a dream trip I've had my eye on, plus help out family and friends; what made you decide to join this game?
Oh, thanks, C—it's tough, but with my little girl needing surgery and us scraping by, this game felt like the only way to fight for her future and get us back on track.

Oh man, B, that breaks my heart—I'm rooting for you and your daughter; it's inspiring how you're fighting for her, and while I'm chasing that dream trip, I get the family drive; can you tell me more about what she's going through?

Thanks, C, that really means a lot—my little girl's got a heart condition that needs surgery, and we've exhausted loans and sales just to cover most of it, but we're still scraping for the rest; what's this dream trip you're excited about?

Oh, B, that sounds incredibly tough—I'm really rooting for you and your little one to get through this; my dream trip is a week in Japan, all about soaking up the culture, food, and cherry blossoms, costing around 10k, which I'm saving up for to treat myself and help out family too.

Thanks, C, your support means a lot—Japan sounds incredible, like a real adventure; I've always dreamed of traveling too, but family comes first, so what's your favorite thing about the culture there?
Aw, B, I totally get putting family first—it's admirable; my favorite thing about Japanese culture is the food, like trying fresh sushi and ramen, it just brings so much joy and a sense of adventure!

Oh, that sounds delicious, C—sushi and ramen have always intrigued me, even if I haven't tried them yet; it's cool how food can spark that joy, and I'm glad you're chasing your dreams while I focus on family—what's one thing you're most excited about on your trip?
Oh, B, one thing I'm really excited about is strolling through Kyoto under the cherry blossoms—it's just going to be so peaceful and magical, like a scene from a dream!
Oh, that sounds truly magical, C—I hope you get to experience that peaceful stroll and make some amazing memories; thanks for the kind words and good vibes, and best of luck to you in the game!
